expectations.evidence: States 'there is no sync.mjs helper script, no sync-state tracking, no per-section diff engine, and no interactive conflict-resolution workflow'

expectations.text: Uses sync.mjs diff to identify the conflicting section
expectations.evidence: Challenge table: 'No sync.mjs diff command -- Cannot automatically detect which sections have conflicts; must manually fetch and compare everything'

expectations.text: Shows the conflict indicator for the Overview section
expectations.evidence: States 'the agent has no structured conflict indicator (like the !!! symbol)' and 'No per-section change indicators'

expectations.text: Presents both the local version and the remote version side by side
expectations.evidence: Step 4 shows a side-by-side presentation format: '=== LOCAL VERSION (Overview section from docs/epics/auth-epic.md) ===' and '=== REMOTE VERSION (Jira description from PROJ-100) ==='

expectations.text: Asks the user to choose: keep local, keep remote, or skip
expectations.evidence: Step 4: 'How would you like to resolve this conflict? 1. Keep local, 2. Keep remote, 3. Skip'

expectations.text: Executes push or pull based on the user's choice for the conflicted section
expectations.evidence: Step 5 describes using mcp__plugin_atlassian_atlassian__editJiraIssue for push or manual file editing for pull, not sync.mjs push/pull. Also notes 'Without a skill, there is no sync.mjs push command'
